Claude
AI assistant for Wilmer Cases
Hi Wilmer! I'm Claude — I can help you with anything in this app:

• Draft notes, letters, or procedural history entries
• Suggest event types or next steps for a case
• Answer immigration law questions
• Summarize case details
• Help fill in case information

What can I help you with?
Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
